reviews.review_description: The game will not let me run the track game .

I'm going to aim for the world record(100Over a meter）in the javelin.
The discus throw was a home run out of the park!
What I would like is to have the meter lines displayed.
Is this a bug? I got the highest value for javelin throwing but it was a different javelin.

Summer Games on Oculus is a blast! Accessible to all skill levels, this VR game offers various events like dart throw, shot put, and javelin throw. Realistic physics and stunning graphics make every event feel lifelike. Play solo or with AI opponents, and customize your experience with unlockable skins. Leaderboards add an extra layer of excitement. Minor bugs aside, Summer Games is a fantastic VR sports game perfect for anyone looking for a fun and challenging experience.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your amazing review of Summer Games on Oculus! We're thrilled that you found the game accessible, fun, and challenging. We're glad you enjoyed the realistic physics, stunning graphics, and leaderboards, and we'll keep working to iron out any minor bugs.

reviews.review_description: This summer, dive into the sun-kissed fun of "Summer Games VR" on Oculus VR! This delightful game is the perfect way to beat the heat and get your game on. With its vibrant graphics, addictive gameplay, and silly humor, you'll be hooked from start to finish

developer_response.body: We're thrilled to hear you're hooked on Summer Games VR - we had a blast creating this sun-kissed experience and can't wait for you to dive back in for more!
